mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 139 > items > 119}. Man-Pack Flamer: Soldiers assigned this weapon must
mechanics.excerpt: 119}. Man-Pack Flamer: Soldiers assigned this weapon must carry a encumbering tank on their backs that fuels the flamer itself. With the hit location rules critical hit (hit location roll of 2) strikes the fuel tank and causes explode destroying the weapon and inflicting the flamer" damage as blast effect (damage type Xl from the soldier as the point of impact; aimed shot can be made against the fuel tank with the same modifiers as head shot.
